title: T-071 — Docs: ADR-002 + ADR-008 + ADR-028 + ADR-029 cross-reference notes for 03-TECHNICAL
prompt: Write a concise ADR cross-ref note for 03-TECHNICAL at design/specs/03-TECHNICAL-ADR-notes.md. Cover: ADR-002 (BOM snapshot pattern — implemented in T-002 + T-025), ADR-008 (audit_log mutation tracking — implemented across T-009/T-010/T-011/T-013/T-014/T-016/T-017/T-021), ADR-028 (schema-driven cols implemented via T-001 ext_jsonb + T-027 propagation), ADR-029 (rule registry — cascade rule deployed in T-024). Each ADR section ends with the canonical task reference and the file/line touched.

pipeline_inputs.description: ADR cross-reference notes mapping each ADR to its task implementations.
pipeline_inputs.details: Useful for reviewers + closeout traceability. No code changes — pure docs.
acceptance_criteria: Given the note exists, when reviewed, then 4 ADRs are cross-referenced with task IDs.
Given a reviewer reads it, when tracing closeout, then they can map ADR-029 cascade rule to T-024 directly.
risk_red_lines: Do not edit ADR source files.
